children.text: The operation of a gift shop or other sales of items associated with collections, exhibits, performances, and special events of the Library of Congress.

children.heading: Individual accounting requirement
children.label: b Individual accounting requirement
children.text: A separate account shall be maintained in the revolving fund under this section with respect to the programs and activities described in each of the paragraphs of subsection (a).

children.heading: Fees for services
children.label: c Fees for services
children.text: The Librarian may charge a fee for services under any of the programs and activities described in subsection (a), and shall deposit any such fees charged into the account of the revolving fund under this section for such program or activity.

children.heading: Contents of accounts in fund
children.label: d Contents of accounts in fund
A
children.text: Amounts deposited by the Librarian under subsection (c).

children.label: B
children.text: Any other amounts received by the Librarian which are attributable to the programs and activities covered by such account.

children.label: C
children.text: Amounts deposited by the Librarian under paragraph (2).

children.label: D
children.text: Such other amounts as may be appropriated under law.

children.label: A
children.text: Any obligated, unexpended balances existing as of the date of the transfer which are attributable to the programs and activities covered by such account.

children.label: i
children.text: the total value of the supplies, inventories, equipment, gift fund balances, and other assets attributable to such programs and activities; and

children.label: ii
children.text: the total value of the liabilities attributable to such programs and activities.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Except as provided in paragraph (2), amounts in the accounts of the revolving fund under this section shall be available to the Librarian, in amounts specified in appropriations Acts and without fiscal year limitation, to carry out the programs and activities covered by such accounts.

children.heading: Special rule for payments for certain Capitol Police services
children.label: 2 Special rule for payments for certain Capitol Police services
children.text: In the case of any amount in the revolving fund consisting of a payment received for services of the United States Capitol Police in connection with a special event or program described in subsection (a)(4), the Librarian shall transfer such amount upon receipt to the Capitol Police for deposit into the applicable appropriations accounts of the Capitol Police.
